info.title: UCP Payment Action Embedded Protocol
info.description: Embedded transport messages for standard UCP payment action surfaces. A platform loads an action config URL in an isolated browser-capable surface. The surface sends JSON-RPC 2.0 notifications to the platform via postMessage (or the equivalent native bridge) to indicate completion or fatal surface failure.

methods.name: pa.done
methods.description: The loaded payment action surface notifies the platform that the scoped interaction is done from the platform-facing surface's perspective. This does not assert payment success or authentication success; the business determines the outcome when the platform resubmits the UCP operation.

schema.description: Runtime action code for the completed action. Well-known values include dev.ucp.payment.device_data_collection and dev.ucp.payment.three_ds_challenge.

methods.name: pa.error
methods.description: The loaded payment action surface notifies the platform that it cannot continue. The platform follows the fallback behavior defined by the owning payment handler and action spec.

schema.description: Surface-level failure. This is not a payment authorization result; domain outcomes remain owned by the business/payment-provider integration.
Runtime action code for the failed action.
